decisions.rationale: MDC re-fires change on [checked] update → infinite CD loop → OOM/SIGKILL
Backend PATCH endpoint calls uuid.UUID(field_id_str) — field names would throw
Angular dev server needs 2-3GB; 2GB Colima default causes SIGKILL during compilation

decisions.decision: Asset metadata inheritance: connection.default_metadata_values merged in dashboard.py
decisions.rationale: Per-account defaults set in Config→Platform Connections→Default Metadata must flow to assets

uncommitted_files: frontend/src/app/features/dashboard/dashboard.component.ts (2 console.log lines added for debugging — remove after diagnosis)
next_action: User shares [EditMetadata] metadata_values: console output → fix key format → remove console.log → run alembic upgrade head → execute /gsd:execute-phase 9
context_notes: Phase 09 is 2/3 plans done. The remaining bug is likely that default_metadata_values JSONB in PlatformConnection uses field names as keys instead of UUIDs, or the values are simply empty/null in the DB. Once that's diagnosed and fixed, Plan 03 (sync pipeline wiring) can be executed to complete the phase.
